metadata.notes: Many BXSL portfolio companies use opaque legal entity names (BidCo, HoldCo, MidCo, TopCo, Buyer, Purchaser structures) that are difficult to map to operating companies without access to SEC filings or proprietary databases. PE sponsors identified through web research of public announcements, press releases, and news coverage.
